title: Puerto Banus Boat Rental: Prices, Tips and Best Boats for 2026
html:
Puerto Banus on the Costa del Sol offers exceptional boating, with day charters starting from around €300. Book a vessel through BoatHire24 to explore the Mediterranean from this glamorous marina. A typical half-day motorboat rental costs from €450, while a crewed yacht for eight guests can exceed €2,000.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

Prices range from €300 for a shared tour to €3,000+ for a crewed superyacht. The cost depends on boat size, duration, and season. Compare verified listings on day charters in Puerto Banus to find your ideal option.

  • Shared tour: from €300 per person for a three-hour excursion.
  • Small motorboat half-day: from €450 for a 6-metre vessel accommodating up to six guests.
  • Catamaran full-day: from €1,200 for a 12-metre catamaran with capacity for twelve.
  • Crewed yacht: from €2,500 for a 15-metre yacht with skipper and crew.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

For most powerboats up to 15 metres, a valid ICC or equivalent licence is required. Spain recognises international certificates, but the operator confirms exact requirements for each boat. Sailing yachts under 7 metres and small tenders may be rented without a licence for a short guided trip.

If you do not hold a licence, consider hiring a skipper. Many Puerto Banus charter companies include a professional captain for around €200 extra per half-day, which is money well spent for peace of mind and local knowledge.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Puerto Banus marina is the main departure point, with access to Marbella, San Pedro, and the Bay of Gibraltar. The port has 915 berths and is surrounded by restaurants and shops. Popular destinations include:

  • Puerto Banus Marina, the central hub for charters, fuel, and provisioning.
  • Marbella, just 6 nautical miles east, with the famous Orange Square and marina.
  • San Pedro de Alcántara, a quieter port 3 nautical miles west.
  • Bay of Gibraltar, about 20 nautical miles south, offering dolphin sightings and stunning views.
  • Estepona, a charming fishing port 10 nautical miles west, with a picturesque old town.
  • Sotogrande, an exclusive marina and resort 15 nautical miles up the coast.

Which boat to rent

Puerto Banus boats range from sporty motorboats to spacious catamarans. Here are popular options:

  1. Fairline Targa 43, ideal for a fast day trip to Marbella; sleeps four; from €1,000 half-day. Visit the Fairline charter page for details.
  2. Azimut 60 Flybridge, comfortable for eight guests with a flybridge lounge; from €2,500 per day.
  3. Lagoon 450 Catamaran, stable and spacious, perfect for group tours; capacity twelve; from €1,500 full-day.
  4. Axopar 28, a versatile RIB for coastal exploration; seats eight; from €500 half-day.
  5. Sunseeker Predator 74, a premium sports yacht for up to twelve; from €4,000 per day.

At a glance

  • Price band: €300, €4,000+ per rental.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Trip length: half-day (4 h) or full-day (8 h).
  • Capacity: 4, 12 guests typically.
  • Currency: EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can you rent a boat in Puerto Banus without a credit card?

Most charter companies accept credit cards and bank transfers, but some may require a deposit in cash for larger yachts.

What is the best time of year for boating in Puerto Banus?

The best time is from May to October when the weather is warm and the sea calm, with average summer water temperatures of 22°C.

How far is it from Puerto Banus to Marbella by boat?

The distance is approximately 6 nautical miles, taking about 20 minutes at cruising speed.

Are there restrictions for swimming in the bay?

You can swim in most areas away from the marina entrance, but always check local rules and buoys marking protected zones.

Whether you are planning a family outing or a corporate event, Puerto Banus offers excellent boating opportunities. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
